Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood,  shellfish or eggs may increase your risk of foodborne illness.
Our Menu
The White Bull seeks to encourage a natural relationship with food, from the way it’s grown to the way it’s served. Sustainably driven and community-focused, our daily menu showcases Georgia’s freshest ingredients at the height of their growing season.
Due to our reliance on local growers, our menu is subject to change based on market availability.
